name: the national-security-systems profile requires the EO security gates (vuln-remediation, signed provenance, audit-log signing)
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'd=YAML.unsafe_load_file(ARGV[0]); r=d["include"]["require"]; exit(r["vulnerability_remediation_gate"]==true && r["signed_provenance_attestation"]==true && r["audit_log_signing"]==true ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/national-security-systems.yaml" && echo c22-nss-gates 1>&2
